[[Lieutenant Commander/Legends|Lieutenant Commander]] '''Nidifer''' was a medical officer of the [[Alliance Military/Legends|Alliance Military]] serving on the hospital ship [[Mercy (hospital ship)|''Mercy'']] in [[5 ABY/Legends|5 ABY]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Dark Forces: Rebel Agent]]'' {{1st}}
